Package logic

Class GameLevel

java.lang.Object
logic.GameLevel
public class GameLevel extends Object
Represents a game level, including its dimensions, grid, components, and game state. Manages the placement and interaction of cards, movers, and modifiers on the grid.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    final HashMap<String,Integer>
    AVAILABLE_MOVERS
    The initial counts of movers available for the player to place.
    final HashSet<Card>
    cardSet
    Set of all active cards currently on the grid.
    final HashSet<GridPos>
    changedPoints
    Set of grid positions that have changed during a tick and need UI updates.
    final ArrayList<Card>
    exitedCardsList
    List of cards that have successfully exited the level.
    final int
    HEIGHT
    The height of this level.
    final List<CardCount>
    INPUT_CARDS
    The list of cards provided as input for this level.

    LEVELID
    The unique identifier for the level.

    The display name of the level.

    The maximum allowed height for a level.

    Set of all movers currently placed on the grid.
    final List<CardCount>
    OUTPUT_CARDS
    The list of cards required for output to complete the level.
    final HashSet<Modifier>
    successfullyModified
    Set of modifiers that have successfully performed an action in the current tick.
    final int
    WIDTH
    The width of this level.

      The initial counts of movers available for the player to place.

      public final ArrayList<Card> exitedCardsList

      Set of all active cards currently on the grid.

      public final HashSet<Modifier> modifierSet
      Set of all modifiers present in the level.

    • moverSet

      public final HashSet<Mover> moverSet
      Set of all movers currently placed on the grid.

    • changedPoints

      public final HashSet<GridPos> changedPoints
      Set of grid positions that have changed during a tick and need UI updates.

    • successfullyModified

      public final HashSet<Modifier> successfullyModified
      Set of modifiers that have successfully performed an action in the current tick.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameLevel

      public GameLevel(String levelID, String levelName, int width, int height, List<CardCount> inputCards, List<CardCount> outputCards, HashMap<String,Integer> availableMovers, GameTile[][] grid, HashSet<Modifier> modifierSet)
      Constructs a new GameLevel with the specified properties.
      Parameters:
      levelID - Unique ID of the level.
      levelName - Name of the level.
      width - Width of the grid.
      height - Height of the grid.
      inputCards - Input card counts.
      outputCards - Target output card counts.
      availableMovers - Available movers for placement.
      grid - The initial grid setup.
      modifierSet - Set of modifiers initially on the grid.

  • Method Details

    • getTile

      public GameTile getTile(GridPos p)
      Retrieves the tile at a specific grid position.
      Parameters:
      p - The GridPos to look up.
      Returns:
      The GameTile at that position.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the position is out of bounds.

    • isInBounds

      public boolean isInBounds(GridPos p)
      Checks if a grid position is within the level boundaries.
      Parameters:
      p - The GridPos to check.
      Returns:
      true if within bounds, false otherwise.

    • getAdjacentTiles

      public GameTile[] getAdjacentTiles(GridPos p)
      Gets the tiles adjacent to a given position.
      Parameters:
      p - The GridPos to find neighbors for.
      Returns:
      An array of 4 GameTile objects (some may be null).

    • setPositionOnGrid

      public boolean setPositionOnGrid(GridIndexable gridIndexable, GridPos newPoint)
      Sets an indexable component's position on the grid.
      Parameters:
      gridIndexable - The component to place.
      newPoint - The new GridPos.
      Returns:
      true if successful.

    • setPositionOnGrid

      public boolean setPositionOnGrid(GridIndexable gridIndexable, GridPos newPoint, boolean force)
      Sets an indexable component's position on the grid, optionally forcing the update.
      Parameters:
      gridIndexable - The component to place.
      newPoint - The new GridPos.
      force - Whether to overwrite an existing component of the same type.
      Returns:
      true if successful.

    • addMover

      public boolean addMover(Mover mover, GridPos newPoint)
      Adds a mover to the grid at a specified position.
      Parameters:
      mover - The Mover to add.
      newPoint - The GridPos where it should be placed.
      Returns:
      true if addition was successful, false otherwise.

    • removeMover

      public boolean removeMover(Mover mover)
      Removes a mover from the grid.
      Parameters:
      mover - The Mover to remove.
      Returns:
      true if removal was successful.

    • addCard

      public boolean addCard(Card card, GridPos newPoint)
      Adds a card to the grid at a specified position.
      Parameters:
      card - The Card to add.
      newPoint - The GridPos where it should be placed.
      Returns:
      true if addition was successful.

    • removeCard

      public boolean removeCard(Card card)
      Removes a card from the grid.
      Parameters:
      card - The Card to remove.
      Returns:
      true if removal was successful.

    • doMovementTick

      public void doMovementTick()
      Executes the movement phase of a game tick. Resolves all card movements and emits an AfterMovementEvent.

    • doModifyTick

      public void doModifyTick()
      Executes the modification phase of a game tick. Invokes all modifiers on the grid and triggers associated effects and sounds.

    • resetLevel

      public void resetLevel()
      Resets the level to its initial state, removing all cards and resetting movers and modifiers.

    • getInstance

      public static GameLevel getInstance()
      Gets the singleton instance of GameLevel.
      Returns:
      The active GameLevel instance.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the instance has not been initialized.

    • setInstance

      public static void setInstance(GameLevel instance)
      Sets the singleton instance of GameLevel.
      Parameters:
      instance - The instance to set.

    • getGrid

      public GameTile[][] getGrid()
      Gets the 2D grid of tiles.
      Returns:
      A 2D array of GameTile.

    • setGrid

      public void setGrid(GameTile[][] grid)
      Sets the grid of tiles.
      Parameters:
      grid - A 2D array of GameTile.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the level's basic info.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      A descriptive string.
